data.title: Pink News
data.description: A bold newspaper ad turned into a viral digital campaign, earning global praise for Mary Kay Brasil.

content:
In March 2024, Mary Kay made a splash in Folha de Sao Paulo newspaper with an editorial ad celebrating the brand's impact on the lives of thousands of Brazilian women.

:::gallery
![](https://images.squarespace-cdn.com/content/v1/60d1f373986b3e43f5079d83/1566e45c-df28-4244-bd5a-5de82f3e52b6/MKFSP_MOCKUP.jpg?format=1000w)
:::

The challenge was bridging the appeal of traditional media with digital audiences and new generations. So, the solution was a retro-inspired campaign, featuring teasers, a special launch, and sustained digital engagement, captivating both followers and Mary Kay's global team.

:::gallery
![](https://cdn.myportfolio.com/de56c461cb7790cb262d7d40e5882517/e1cae7b6-7630-45fc-80d1-9a95010b140e_rw_1920.jpg?h=55d742aeb74e6c896f7a217620517a28)
![](https://cdn.myportfolio.com/de56c461cb7790cb262d7d40e5882517/51ba0051-a515-4933-bacd-a9f581971856_rw_1920.jpg?h=389d7c466ccb2a5fb1b8a77f2219a35d)
:::

[video](https://player.vimeo.com/video/1063833101 "Teaser")

So, the solution was a retro-inspired campaign, featuring teasers, a special launch, and sustained digital engagement, captivating both followers and Mary Kay's global team.

:::gallery
![](https://i.imgur.com/9HuqFSp.mp4)
![](https://i.imgur.com/gItXLQs.mp4)
:::

The campaign's success, embodied by the impact of the Pink Newspaper, earned recognition all the way at the brand's headquarters in Dallas.
